x, y = symbols(\"x y\")
zero = EX((x**2 - 1)/(x - 1) - x - 1)
print(\"provable-zero:\", zero.as_expr().is_zero, bool(zero), Poly(zero.as_expr(), y, domain=EX).rep)
unknown = EX(x)
print(\"unknown:\", unknown.as_expr().is_zero, bool(unknown), Poly(x, y, domain=EX).is_zero)'"

print(\"unknown:\", unknown.as_expr().is_zero, bool(unknown), Poly(x, y, domain=EX).is_zero)'"

from sympy import S
from sympy.polys.domains import EX
candidates = [
    2**(S(1)/3)*3**(S(2)/3) - 18**(S(1)/3),
    2**(S(2)/3)*3**(S(1)/3) - 12**(S(1)/3),
]

    print(repr(expr), expr == 0, expr.is_zero, bool(e), repr(e))
PY"
